name: classes
context: Apply Tailwind utility classes — layout, spacing, typography, colors, borders, effects, and state variants
info: This skill covers the full Tailwind utility class system: layout (flex, grid, position), spacing (padding, margin, gap), sizing (width, height, max/min), typography (font size, weight, color, tracking, leading), backgrounds and colors, borders and rounded corners, shadows and effects, transforms and transitions, and state variants (hover, focus, active, disabled, group-hover, peer). Agents use this skill when building or modifying UI components, fixing layout issues, or translating designs into markup. Classes follow a consistent naming convention: `{property}-{value}` with optional variant prefixes like `hover:`, `sm:`, `dark:`. See [[tailwind/config]] for customizing the theme that drives available class values, [[tailwind/responsive]] for breakpoint prefixes, and [[tailwind/dark-mode]] for the dark: variant.
body:
# Tailwind Utility Classes Every Tailwind class maps to one CSS property-value pair. You compose them in HTML/JSX to build any design. ## Layout ```html
Logo
Links
Main
Sidebar
Badge
``` ### Key layout classes | Class | CSS | |-------|-----| | `flex` | `display: flex` | | `grid` | `display: grid` | | `hidden` | `display: none` | | `block` | `display: block` | | `inline-flex` | `display: inline-flex` | | `items-center` | `align-items: center` | | `justify-between` | `justify-content: space-between` | | `gap-4` | `gap: 1rem` | | `grid-cols-3` | `grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr))` | | `col-span-2` | `grid-column: span 2 / span 2` | ## Spacing Spacing uses a 4px (0.25rem) base scale. `p-4` = `padding: 1rem`, `m-2` = `margin: 0.5rem`. ```html

Paragraph with bottom margin

Paragraph with vertical spacing between siblings

``` | Prefix | Property | |--------|----------| | `p-` | padding (all sides) | | `px-` | padding-left + padding-right | | `py-` | padding-top + padding-bottom | | `pt-`, `pr-`, `pb-`, `pl-` | individual sides | | `m-` | margin (all sides) | | `mx-auto` | horizontal centering | | `gap-` | flex/grid gap | | `space-x-`, `space-y-` | between children | ## Sizing ```html

Heading

Body text with relaxed line height.

Label ``` | Class | Effect | |-------|--------| | `text-xs` through `text-9xl` | font size | | `font-thin` through `font-black` | font weight | | `font-sans`, `font-serif`, `font-mono` | font family | | `tracking-tight`, `tracking-wide` | letter spacing | | `leading-tight`, `leading-relaxed` | line height | | `uppercase`, `lowercase`, `capitalize` | text transform | | `truncate` | single-line ellipsis | | `line-clamp-3` | multi-line truncation | ## Colors & Backgrounds Tailwind ships a full color palette with shades 50-950 in OKLCH (v4). ```html
Error
50% transparent black overlay
Custom hex color
``` Color utilities: `bg-`, `text-`, `border-`, `ring-`, `fill-`, `stroke-`, `outline-`, `shadow-`, `accent-`, `caret-`, `divide-`, `placeholder-`. ## Borders & Rounded Corners ```html
Row 1
Row 2
``` ## Shadows & Effects ```html
Card shadow
Half transparent
Blurred content
Frosted glass
``` ## Transitions & Transforms ```html
Scale on hover
``` ## State Variants ```html Link text Error message

    Card Title

    Description text here.

sections.title: Spacing and sizing
sections.body: Spacing scale is based on `--spacing` (default 0.25rem / 4px). `p-1` = 0.25rem, `p-4` = 1rem, `p-8` = 2rem. Use `px-`, `py-`, `pt-`, `pr-`, `pb-`, `pl-` for directional padding; same prefixes with `m` for margin. `mx-auto` centers horizontally. `space-y-4` adds vertical space between children. Sizing: `w-full`, `w-screen`, `w-1/2`, `w-64`, `h-screen`, `min-h-0`, `max-w-md`, `max-w-7xl`, `size-12` (width + height). Arbitrary: `w-[calc(100%-2rem)]`.

sections.title: Typography utilities
sections.body: Size: `text-xs` (0.75rem) through `text-9xl` (8rem). Weight: `font-thin` (100) through `font-black` (900). Family: `font-sans`, `font-serif`, `font-mono`. Spacing: `tracking-tighter` through `tracking-widest`. Line height: `leading-none` (1) through `leading-loose` (2). Transform: `uppercase`, `lowercase`, `capitalize`, `normal-case`. Alignment: `text-left`, `text-center`, `text-right`, `text-justify`. Decoration: `underline`, `line-through`, `no-underline`. Wrapping: `truncate`, `text-ellipsis`, `text-nowrap`, `line-clamp-{n}`, `break-words`, `break-all`.

sections.title: Colors and backgrounds
sections.body: Tailwind ships a full palette: `slate`, `gray`, `zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`, `red`, `orange`, `amber`, `yellow`, `lime`, `green`, `emerald`, `teal`, `cyan`, `sky`, `blue`, `indigo`, `violet`, `purple`, `fuchsia`, `pink`, `rose`. Each has shades 50-950. Apply with `bg-{color}-{shade}`, `text-{color}-{shade}`, `border-{color}-{shade}`. Opacity: `bg-black/50` (50% opacity). Gradients: `bg-linear-to-r from-blue-500 to-purple-500`. Arbitrary: `bg-[#1a1a2e]`, `text-[oklch(0.5_0.2_240)]`.

sections.title: Borders, shadows, and effects
sections.body: Borders: `border`, `border-2`, `border-t`, `border-gray-200`, `rounded-sm` through `rounded-full`, `divide-y`, `divide-gray-200`, `ring-2`, `ring-blue-500`, `ring-offset-2`. Shadows: `shadow-sm`, `shadow`, `shadow-md`, `shadow-lg`, `shadow-xl`, `shadow-2xl`, `shadow-none`. Effects: `opacity-{n}`, `blur-sm` through `blur-3xl`, `backdrop-blur-md`, `brightness-{n}`, `contrast-{n}`, `grayscale`, `invert`, `saturate-{n}`. Transitions: `transition`, `transition-colors`, `transition-transform`, `duration-200`, `ease-in-out`, `delay-150`.

sections.title: State and interaction variants
sections.body: Pseudo-class: `hover:`, `focus:`, `active:`, `disabled:`, `visited:`, `first:`, `last:`, `odd:`, `even:`, `required:`, `invalid:`, `checked:`, `placeholder:`. Group: add `group` to parent, use `group-hover:` on children. Peer: add `peer` to sibling, use `peer-invalid:` on target. Has: `has-[:checked]:bg-blue-50`. Data attributes: `data-[active]:opacity-100`. Aria: `aria-selected:bg-blue-100`. Not: `not-hover:opacity-75`. These all compose: `dark:md:hover:bg-blue-700`.

links.context: Customize the theme that drives available class values
Add responsive breakpoint prefixes to any class
Use the dark: variant for theme-aware styling
Add custom utilities and components via plugins
v4 changes: new gradient syntax, container queries, 3D transforms

related.note: Theme configuration determines which values are available for each utility
Responsive prefixes modify when utility classes apply
Dark mode is a variant that wraps any utility class
